text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Corrida—uma intensa dispulta de<n>velocidade contra velocidade, onde<n>cada milisegundo conta.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Certa noite, Encontro uma estudande<n>correndo silenciosamente no<n>gramado, totalmente perdida num<n>mundo so dela.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: "Feliz." Nenhuma outra palavra pode<n>descrever melhor a expressão<n>estampada no rosto de Silence<n>Suzuka quando eu a vi pela primeira<n>vez.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... He-he!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Não é comum ver alguém na pista<n>tarde da noite em dia de folga. Ela<n>continua correndo numa velocidade<n>impressionante.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ufa! a pista vazia só pra mim... Correr<n>de noite é realmente melhor.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: E pode ser só minha imaginação,<n>mas as estrelas parecem mais<n>brilhantes que o usual essa noite.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hihi. tenho essa vista só pra mim

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm... Posso te ajudar com alguma<n>coisa?
choice_data_list:
Ah não. só estava vendo como você parecia
contente.

Ah não. só estava vendo como você parecia
contente.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ohh? É mesmo?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hm... Desculpe, mas se me dá licença<n>Eu gostaria de correr um pouco mais.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: E após uma breve troca de palavras,<n>Silece Suzuka, começa a correr uma<n>vez mais. Ela ainda não parecia<n>satisfeita com seu treino extra<n>noturno

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Faz tempo que não vejo uma<n>corredora tão feliz por está na pista a<n>noite. A visão dela cortando o vento<n>da noite é digno de ser apreciado.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Somente mais alguns dias até poder<n>vê-la novamente.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Ela está participando dos testes da<n>Academia hoje. Todas as estudantes<n>estão prontas para correr e<n>demonstrar suas habilidades na<n>esperança de serem recrutadas.

text_block_list.name: Narradora
text_block_list.text: Ela é veloz—realmente rápida. E lá vai<n>Silence Suzuka, liderando por cinco<n>corpos. Seis corpos. Ela lidera por<n>sete corpos de distância.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano A
text_block_list.text: Como ela mantém essa velocidade?<n>Ela realmente prentede continuar<n>assim até o fim?

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano B
text_block_list.text: Era de se esperar que já estivesse<n>cansando mas ela se recusa a<n>entregar essa imensa vantagem!

text_block_list.name: Narradora
text_block_list.text: As corredoras entram na reta final. A<n>distância diminui lentamente—mas<n>Silence Suzuka se mantém firme!<n>Será que ela consegue manter o<n>ritmo?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Não entregarei a liderança... Paraninguém!

text_block_list.name: Narradora
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka cruza a linha de<n>chegada! Ela vence com facilidade,<n>deixando todas para trás!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Nem as competidoras nem os gritos<n>da torcida importam pra corredora.<n>Tudo que ela precisa é o olhar fixo a<n>frente pra vencer com uma vantagem<n>tão grande.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ufa...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Of course, I am not the only one to<n>have such a thought.

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano B
text_block_list.text: Suzuka! That was truly a marvelous<n>display! I would like to talk to you<n>about a training contract.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh? Oh, um... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano B
text_block_list.text: You've a fine pair of legs to be sure,<n>but I just know that you are capable<n>of so much more!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: More than that? Do you mean it?

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano B
text_block_list.text: Yes. You performed wonderfully, but I<n>can tell that you would be nearly<n>invincible with a bit more practical<n>knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Treinador Veterano B
text_block_list.text: If you'd like, I would be happy to<n>teach you a better way of running. I<n>dare say that it would give you the<n>lead in any race you desire to run in.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: The lead... in any race?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All right. I accept your scouting offer.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Unsurprisingly, she is snatched up<n>before I am able to utter even a single<n>word.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: I enter the library one day to find<n>Silence Suzuka and Air Groove<n>engaged in a rather<n>technical-sounding conversation.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You'll be needing anaerobic energy<n>for that instantaneous burst of speed.<n>And in order to maintain that speed,<n>you need aerobic energy.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: There's a limit to how much<n>anaerobic energy the body can afford<n>to expend, so it's of the utmost<n>importance to decide how to conserve<n>and use it.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Then that means, in order to speed up<n>later on, I should focus on conserving<n>energy at the start of a race by<n>suppressing my speed... Do I have it<n>right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Right. This is one of the basic<n>foundations of modern racing theory.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Theory is not something I've ever<n>given much thought to before... I<n>suppose it's time I learned a bit more<n>about it...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Air Groove. I'm glad you<n>could break it down for me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: It's my pleasure.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But I am a little surprised. You're<n>known for exploding into the lead<n>right from the outset of a race and<n>staying there. This would be quite a<n>change of pace.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, just a little.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'd better start today's runs and<n>practice what you've told me. I'll see<n>you again later.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yeah...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Theory... That must mean that it's the<n>proper way of doing things. Okay, if i<n>run the way she taught me...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'll be fine. And surely the scenery<n>will become even more beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: There's an air of doubt in her quiet<n>murmurings. And having heard them, I<n>cannot help but become a bit<n>concerned for the renowned front<n>runner.
